title: Brogy’s Victory Turns Bitter
description: On pages 12–15, brogy’s victory turns bitter as dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride.
scene: Brogy’s Victory Turns Bitter. Dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A devil fruit user, were you now...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't worry, you did the right thing.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He wouldn't have calmed down otherwise.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's as the Mister here said.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: who placed a bomb inside that barrel of rum.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And my crewmates would never have done such a low act!
